rationale: Neither the VST 10-Q (2026-05-08) nor the CEG 10-Q (2026-05-11) filing texts contain any disclosed numeric data on grid interconnection queue lead times, queue utilization, interconnection-related pricing changes, capex guidance tied to queue progression, or process-node mix relevant to the interconnection-queue bottleneck stage; both filings are XBRL-heavy financial statement extracts focused on segment revenues, derivatives, debt, and M&A (e.g., CEG's Calpine acquisition), with no quantitative interconnection queue metrics stated.
